army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy, 0-2 Traits

If a Trait is taken, all models / units in the army must be upgraded with it, unless stated otherwise.

archetypes.name: Demiurg
archetypes.description:
- This army and the Tau consider each other Battle Brothers (Green allies).
- This army must either take an Allied Tau detachment, or be an Allied detachment to a Tau primary army.

archetypes.name: Einhyr Guard
archetypes.description:
- Einhyr Hearthguard can be taken as Troops.
- A Kâhl or High Kâhl must be taken as a HQ selection.
- Hearthkyn Warriors become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Hearthfyre Arsenal
archetypes.description:
- For every 500 points of game size, a single Brokhyr Iron-master may be included in the army that does not take up an HQ slot.                                                                                        
- Hearthkyn Warriors do not count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Persecution Prospect
archetypes.description:
- Hernkyn Yaegirs can be taken as Troops. 
- All units without Infiltrate or with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units without Infiltrate that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: League of Explorers
legacies.description: The army has access to the Trans-Hyperain Alliance armory.

legacies.name: League of Leagues
legacies.description: The army has access to the Greater Thurian League armory.

legacies.name: League of Magnates
legacies.description: The army has access to the Ymir Conglomerate armory.

legacies.name: League of Sentinels
legacies.description: The army has access to the Urani-Surtr Regulates armory.

legacies.name: League of Warriors
legacies.description: The army has access to the Kronus Hegemony armory.

traits.name: Brutal Efficiency
traits.description: The unit's weapons gain "Deflagrate(5+)" against targets with one or more Judgement tokens.

traits.name: Dour Survivalists
traits.description: After this unit resolves a "Stand & Shoot" order, it can't receive any Battleshock tokens until its next activation.

traits.name: Frontier Momentum
traits.description: The unit is able to use the "Advance" command.

traits.name: Fury from the Delve
traits.description: The unit gains the "Deep strike" ability.

traits.name: Grudgebearers
traits.description: During each Command phase, all enemy units that are currently holding a mission objective receive a Judgement token.

traits.name: Honor in Toil
traits.description: If this unit is at or below half its starting strength or has suffered at least two Permanent or Structural damage results, add +1 to all its hit rolls.

traits.name: HUNTR's Mark
traits.description: Vehicles can fire one additional weapon if they move more than 6" and up to 12".

traits.name: Ironskein
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one save per battle round.

traits.name: Martial Cloneskeins
traits.description: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Master Salvagers
traits.description: Vehicles can use the "Brokhyr's Guild" ability (See Brokhyr Iron-master) on themselves, but only for repairs.

traits.name: Pan-Spectral Visualizers
traits.description: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Quick to Judge
traits.description: When this unit removes one or more models, or suffers Permanent or Structural damage, roll 1D6. On a 4+, the attacking enemy unit gains one Judgement token.

traits.name: Trivärg Cyber Implants
traits.description: If the unit disembarked from a transport this round, all of its weapons gain the "Armor piercing(5+)" ability for this activation.

traits.name: Vengeful
traits.description: When this unit is removed from the game, place two Judgement tokens next to the enemy unit that caused the last wound instead of one.

traits.name: Voidship Specialists
traits.description: The unit does not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.
